name: lui_ori_sw_offset_fold
title: lui+ori+sw(0) -> lui+sw(%lo) via subst + delete
summary: Target folds a (lui $R,%hi)(ori $R,$R,%lo)(sw $X,0($R)) trio into (lui $R,%hi)(sw $X,%lo($R)). Our pipeline emits the verbose form. Two regfix rules collapse it.

structural: Three consecutive insns at indices N, N+1, N+2 of the form: lui $R,0xHI / ori $R,$R,0xLO / sw $X,0($R)
Target has only two: lui $R,0xHI / sw $X,0xLO($R)

rule_skeleton.comment: fold the ori's low-half into the sw offset

notes: The same fold applies to lh / lhu / lw / lb / lbu / sb / sh on the load/store side.
Replacement text uses plain `$N`, not `\$N` (see feedback_regfix_replacement_escape.md).
Validate with `dc.sh validate-regfix --live --func F` before commit.
